inputs.label: Annual Salary
inputs.businessContext: Employee's gross annual salary. Based on standard employment contracts.

inputs.label: Years of Service
inputs.businessContext: Total years employee has worked for the employer. Used in severance and leave accrual calculations.

inputs.label: Additional Months of Service
inputs.businessContext: Remaining months beyond full years. Used for prorated calculations.

inputs.label: Annual Leave Days Accrued
inputs.businessContext: Total annual leave days accrued but not taken. Based on company policy or labor law.

inputs.label: Annual Leave Days Taken
inputs.businessContext: Number of leave days already taken in the current period.

inputs.label: Severance Multiplier (weeks per year)
inputs.businessContext: Number of weeks of severance pay per year of service. Typically defined by labor law or contract.

inputs.label: Notice Period
inputs.businessContext: Length of notice period required before termination. Based on employment contract or statutory requirements.

inputs.label: Working Days per Week
inputs.businessContext: Standard working days per week. Used to convert weeks to days.

inputs.label: Currency
inputs.businessContext: Currency for monetary values. Allows localization.

thresholds.leaveDaysAccrued > 30: High accrued leave days; consider encouraging leave usage.
thresholds.severanceMultiplier > 2: Severance multiplier is high; check contract terms.
thresholds.noticePeriod > 12: Notice period exceeds typical maximum; verify.

suggestedActions: Encourage employee to take accrued leave to reduce liability.
Review severance policy if multiplier is high.
Ensure notice period is compliant with local laws.
